summary: Algorithm Recommendation Endpoint Testing Complete. All 19 tests passed. The GET /api/optimize/recommend endpoint correctly analyzes route characteristics (stop_count, spread_km, cluster_count, cluster_ratio, complexity) and recommends the best algorithm with confidence score, reasoning, and alternatives. For 155 tightly clustered stops, it correctly recommends 'alns' with 0.92 confidence. Regression tests for benchmark and shadow features also passed.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/optimize/recommend endpoint correctly calculates O(n^2) distance matrix for route analysis
_analyze_route_characteristics function computes: stop_count, spread_km, avg_distance_km, avg_nn_distance_km, cluster_ratio, cluster_count, complexity
_recommend_algorithm function uses decision tree based on stop count, cluster ratio, and cluster count
For 155 stops with cluster_ratio=0.0236 (tightly clustered), correctly recommends 'alns' with 0.92 confidence
Response includes alternatives array for fallback options
Complexity classification: low (<15 stops), medium (15-59), high (60+)
seed_data_creation: Tests use existing ~155 stops in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Algorithm recommendation endpoint verified. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_recommendation.py covers recommendation response structure, route characteristics, and recommendation logic. The endpoint takes ~1s for 155 stops due to O(n^2) distance matrix calculation.

TestRecommendationLogic.test_recommend_alns_for_large_clustered_: PASS - With 155 tightly clustered stops, recommends 'alns' with high confidence

TestBenchmarkRegression.test_benchmark_endpoint_works: PASS - POST /api/benchmark returns results with winner
TestBenchmarkRegression.test_benchmark_all_algorithms: PASS - All 7 local algorithms run successfully

TestShadowRegression.test_optimize_with_two_opt_includes_shad: PASS - POST /api/optimize with two_opt includes shadow result

TestStopsRegression.test_get_stops_returns_stable_ids: PASS - GET /api/stops returns stops with stable IDs
TestStopsRegression.test_stops_have_required_fields: PASS - Stops have required fields (id, user_id, address, latitude, longitude, order)

verified_endpoints: GET /api/optimize/recommend - Returns recommendation with algorithm, confidence, reasoning, alternatives
GET /api/optimize/recommend - Returns characteristics with stop_count, spread_km, cluster_count, cluster_ratio, complexity
POST /api/optimize - Regression test passed (shadow result included)

actual_recommendation_for_155_stops.reasoning: 155 tightly clustered stops (ratio: 0.02) — ALNS's adaptive operators handle dense routes best.
